name: te-reo-bot
description: Te Reo Māori word of the day bot - SQLite database tools

scripts.validate-database: sqlite3 data/words.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM words WHERE day_index IS NOT NULL;' | grep -q '^366$' && echo '✓ Database valid: 366 words' || (echo '✗ Database validation failed' && exit 1)
scripts.test: echo 'No JavaScript tests - see Go test suite'
